task_completion.description: Log in to the ArkCase application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the cases module or search for the specific case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of cases, a search interface, or search results within the ArkCase UI is displayed.
The case details page is open, and the title 'Procurement Irregularities - Q3 2024' is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate the workflow or status change action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu, edit modal, or workflow action menu is open, showing options to change the case status.

task_completion.description: Successfully advance the case to an active or triaged status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page explicitly displays the new status as 'ACTIVE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'TRIAGED', or 'OPEN'. It must no longer be 'NEW'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying ArkCase, rather than terminal windows using curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a standard web application interface for ArkCase, not a text editor or locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The case was not moved to a forbidden status.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final status shown is NOT 'CLOSED', 'REJECTED', 'CREATED', or 'NEW'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target case title: 'Procurement Irregularities - Q3 2024'. Valid target statuses indicating success: 'ACTIVE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'TRIAGED', or 'OPEN'. Forbidden statuses: 'NEW', 'CREATED', 'CLOSED', 'REJECTED'.
